description: Verso: Unidentified document in Arabic script. Begins: "min dhālika" then gives the date: Sunday, 16 Rabiʿ I 403 = 5 October 1012 CE. There are three full lines, crossed out. The name Sahl may appear several times. Needs examination. Reused on recto for a Hebrew/Aramaic/Judaeo-Arabic text.
description_he: בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
